mapper.sql: task_key as taskKey, name, cron_expression as cronExpression, enabled, lock_ttl_seconds as lockTtlSeconds, next_fire_at as nextFireAt, registration_status as registrationStatus, trace_id as traceId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt

plan_id as planId, task_key as taskKey, owner_user_id as ownerUserId, cron_expression as cronExpression, payload_json as payloadJson, enabled, next_fire_at as nextFireAt, trace_id as traceId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt

task_run_id as taskRunId, task_key as taskKey, plan_id as planId, trigger_type as triggerType, status, requested_by_user_id as requestedByUserId, scheduled_fire_at as scheduledFireAt, started_at as startedAt, ended_at as endedAt, owner_instance_id as ownerInstanceId, stop_requested_at as stopRequestedAt, stop_requested_by_user_id as stopRequestedByUserId, stop_reason as stopReason, skip_reason as skipReason, error_code as errorCode, error_message as errorMessage, result_json as resultJson, trace_id as traceId, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, execution_affinity as executionAffinity
mapper.select: select from scheduled_tasks order by task_key limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.sql: task_key=#{taskKey}, plan_id=#{planId}, trigger_type=#{triggerType}, status=#{status}, requested_by_user_id=#{requestedByUserId}, scheduled_fire_at=#{scheduledFireAt}, started_at=#{startedAt}, ended_at=#{endedAt}, owner_instance_id=#{ownerInstanceId}, stop_requested_at=#{stopRequestedAt}, stop_requested_by_user_id=#{stopRequestedByUserId}, stop_reason=#{stopReason}, skip_reason=#{skipReason}, error_code=#{errorCode}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, result_json=#{resultJson}, trace_id=#{traceId}, created_at=#{createdAt}, updated_at=#{updatedAt}, execution_affinity=#{executionAffinity}
mapper.update: update scheduled_task_runs set where task_run_id=#{taskRunId} and status=#{expectedStatus}
mapper.select: select from scheduled_task_runs where task_key=#{taskKey} and status in ('PENDING','RUNNING','STOPPING') and task_run_id != #{excludedTaskRunId} order by updated_at desc, id desc limit 1
select from scheduled_task_runs order by scheduled_fire_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
